description: Phish.in is an open archive of live Phish audience recordings with streaming playback, show/song/venue discovery, and playlist features. It also provides programmatic access to Phish data through a JSON API and MCP endpoints for AI assistants.
summary: Phish.in exposes a public REST API v2, a legacy REST API v1 with unclear current auth requirements, and public MCP endpoints at `/mcp`, `/mcp/openai`, and `/mcp/anthropic`.
